label: Bi-orthogonal Picone identity generalizes Newcomb node-counting to non-self-adjoint operators

provenance.source_span: Global m = 1 Stabilization of a Rotating Helical Z-pinch at Finite Pressure A. Kumar,1 J. C. Turner,2 A. Stepanov,2 T. Karminskaya,2 J. Flygare,2 J. Dadras,2 and C. Rea1 1 Plasma Science and Fusion Center, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Cambridge, MA 02139, USA 2

rewrite_history.justification: Out-of-regime predictions created residuals; narrowing preserves in-regime strength while reducing cross-regime tension.

strengths: Links Newcomb-style counting to the non-self-adjoint setting needed for flow.
weaknesses: The scalar seed may hide technical assumptions required for the bi-orthogonal Picone identity.
